summary: Validated final admin/auth flows on public preview URL with final credentials. API login/me/logout and admin UI login/logout all pass; final account is SUPER_ADMIN.
critical_code_review_comments: No blocking code issues found for requested admin/auth flows; FastAPI auth proxies and Next auth handlers behave correctly on preview ingress.
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created in this run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Public validation target used: https://greeters-preview.preview.emergentagent.com. Verified with final admin account florence.levot@nexus-conseil.ch: login 200, me 200, logout 200 then me 401, and /admin UI shows Florence Levot with role SUPER_ADMIN.
rca of the issue: N/A - no failures in requested scope. A first UI check captured transient sidebar loading text ('Connexion en cours'), resolved within polling window; session values updated correctly to SUPER_ADMIN.
